title: MV Hondius expedition completes voyage; index case identified
description: Initial Andes hantavirus case linked to the MV Hondius expedition is identified after disembarkation; multinational case-finding begins.

title: WHO publishes Disease Outbreak News DON599
description: WHO issues DON599 describing the initial Andes hantavirus cluster aboard MV Hondius and the multinational case-finding effort.

title: ECDC Rapid Risk Assessment published
description: ECDC publishes a Rapid Risk Assessment for the cruise-ship hantavirus cluster, recommending escalation to airborne precautions during aerosol-generating procedures.

title: CDC issues HAN 528
description: CDC issues Health Alert Network 528 for U.S. clinical awareness, infection prevention, and exposure reporting for Andes virus.

title: Radboud UMC places 12 staff in precautionary quarantine
description: 12 staff at Radboud UMC in Nijmegen, Netherlands, placed in precautionary quarantine after an incorrect blood-sampling procedure was followed with a confirmed Andes hantavirus patient.

title: ECDC surveillance update — 11 cases, 3 deaths
description: ECDC publishes an updated surveillance summary: 9 confirmed and 2 probable cases (11 total) with 3 deaths reported across 9 countries; risk for the EU/EEA assessed as VERY LOW.

title: Africa CDC reports suspected Ebola outbreak in Ituri
description: Africa CDC and DRC public health authorities report a suspected Ebola outbreak in Ituri Province caused by Bundibugyo virus; cross-border concern raised for Uganda and South Sudan.

title: Continued increase in U.S. measles cases reported
description: Surveillance indicates continued rise in U.S. measles cases through 2026, raising concern for the Americas region's elimination status.

title: Clade I mpox importation case reported in Connecticut
description: U.S. clade I mpox importation case reported in Connecticut, set against declining mpox case trends across much of Africa but with a continuing South Sudan surge.

title: Fatal H5N6 case reported in China; LA cat-to-human serology signal
description: Continued zoonotic influenza signals: a fatal H5N6 case in China and an H5 cat-to-human serology signal under investigation in the Los Angeles area.

title: Cholera activity sustained across multiple African countries
description: Africa CDC reports continued cholera activity with elevated fatality concern in the Republic of Congo.

title: Chikungunya activity reported across multiple PAHO countries
description: Surveillance shows chikungunya activity across multiple Americas countries with Brazil among the highest-burden settings.

title: C. auris wastewater detections expand across U.S. states
description: Wastewater surveillance identifies expanding C. auris signal across multiple U.S. states, complementing clinical surveillance.
